openQuestions: The A1 on-write write-latency of pure-scorer + non-mutating-reviewer scoring on a large authored spec (005 spec.md is 10.6KB) (inherited; a build-stage timing measurement)
The per-detector corpus-wide failure counts (the Stage-0 census; every prior lineage's asserted-not-counted band; deferred to a build)
The precision/recall of the entailment-based contradiction detector on graph-nominated candidate pairs (inherited from dq-novel-oob; deferred to a build)

keyFindings.finding: The unified rollout is a topological sort of FIVE inviolable dependency edges (census-before-gate, engine-before-front-doors, backfill-before-error, coverage-guard-before-retrieval-trust, C2-before-retrieval-promotion) into a 17-stage / 7-phase master sequence. Phases I-V ship the floor-bypassing reuse-first half on cost; Phase VI adds the novel correctness/adherence program report-only and parallelizes with III-V; Phase VII builds the measurement (C2) FIRST then touches the retrieval half. The safety property IS the order.

Corpus migration is a four-beat per-gate discipline that does not compress: WARN -> BACKFILL -> RE-MEASURE-TO-ZERO -> ERROR, built on the read-only Stage-0 census. The doc-gate migration (ships on cost) and the retrieval migration (frozen behind the NET-NEW coverage guard + the dual-cache-key fix at embedding-cache.ts:157 / shared/embeddings.ts:309-311) are TWO migrations with different gates. The legacy-corpus invariant: no new hard rule errors before its backfill report reads zero; the legacy_grandfathered bypass (0 packets) is deleted only at ERROR.

The safety model has four components: (1) a fixClass taxonomy {safe = deterministic/length-neutral/metadata-only/auto-applies; guarded = deterministic/higher-blast/--confirm; report-only = body-touching OR LLM-generated OR retrieval-class/never-auto} frozen in detector-registry.ts under two structural invariants INV-1 (body-touching => never safe; the destructive quality-loop substring-trim stays quarantined to memory-save) and INV-2 (retrieval-class => never promoted without prod@3); (2) per-stage rollback named before each stage runs; (3) four human-in-the-loop boundaries (auto-safe-fix / --confirm-guarded / always-human-authored body / release-reviewer prod@3); (4) four standing drift guards (embedding-version, coverage, read-time content_hash, cross-copy trigger-vocab).

Measurement is governed by one-reader-one-metric-no-cross-credit. Four tiers each earn a keep on their OWN reader: write-time = corpus conformance-to-zero + a scratch-packet regression-catch (NOT a retrieval claim); scheduled = escape-class defects (path-filter escapes, backfill blind spots, cross-surface coherence) the change-triggered pre-commit+CI tiers structurally miss; retrieval = prod-mode completeRecall@3 RISE ONLY via run-eval-v2.mjs dual-mode (external @5/@10/@20 and eval@K are INADMISSIBLE because the K=3 floor hides that band); novel program = each item on its own non-retrieval metric (assembler = token-per-relevant-row + dup rate, no re-index; contradiction = precision/recall on graph-nominated pairs).

The consolidated NO-GO list (18 items, merged + de-duplicated, each with a deciding reason) is a DERIVED consequence of 10 generative governance anti-patterns: eval-mode saturation, silent-drop (028 trap), destructive auto-fix, net-negative rollup, mixed-vector confound, rebuild-shipped-machinery, five-engines, premature-error, change-triggered blind spot, proxy-as-truth. A future candidate is judged by which anti-pattern it would trip, not by list membership. The deepest anti-pattern (proxy/off-floor-metric mistaken for the prod reader outcome) subsumes every retrieval NO-GO and CONDITIONAL freeze.

Three cross-lineage conflicts all share ONE shape (build-vs-wire) and the Stage-0 census is their common resolver: (1) dq-deep 'extend quality-loop.ts' is corrected by dq-automation-impl to 'reuse the PURE computeMemoryQualityScore + non-mutating reviewPostSaveQuality; quarantine the destructive runQualityLoop to memory-save'; (2) dq-deep 'no retroactive automation exists' is corrected by dq-skilldoc to 'only the cron tier is empty; 8 CI workflows exist'; (3) dq-probe 'build a wikilink validator' is corrected by dq-skilldoc to 'already built + CI-wired; add only the missing pre-commit timing'. The spine's first rule: confirm what ships before authoring anything.

The consolidated program SURVIVES adversarial verification (6 attacks, 0 deliverables overturned). Load-bearing edge confirmed: S9 drift-monitor BEFORE S14 C2 (else the prod@3 read is confounded by mixed vectors). Boundary confirmed: CI is report-only because the governance boundary is blast-radius-human-reviewed, not fix-safety. ONE real gap found and closed: the frozen fixClass registry guards ITSELF — a change to detector-registry.ts is a guarded-class change re-checking INV-1/INV-2. RAIL-2 has NO escape path: every retrieval item routes through C2; the context-budget assembler correctly bypasses C2 as a non-retrieval (post-floor, no-re-index) item.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Interleaving retrieval stages with the floor-bypassing stages to ship faster
ruledOutDirections.reason: breaks the C2-before-promotion edge and re-creates the eval-mode saturation trap

ruledOutDirections.approach: Forcing the report-only novel slate behind the migration
ruledOutDirections.reason: the novel slate is report-only/additive; it carries no backfill/error dependency and parallelizes with III-V

ruledOutDirections.approach: Compressing the migration warn->error into a single flip
ruledOutDirections.reason: the premature-error trap; the census exists because the corpus band is asserted-not-counted
classification is a property of the FIX; per-detector flags let two detectors disagree on the same fix shape; one frozen deny-by-default registry
--confirm gates the safe tier ONLY; risky/none always report-only

ruledOutDirections.approach: Promoting a retrieval candidate on external @5/@10/@20 or eval-mode @K
ruledOutDirections.reason: the K=3 prod floor hides exactly that band; read the prod column

ruledOutDirections.approach: Treating the NO-GO list as a static blocklist
ruledOutDirections.reason: it is a derived consequence of the 10 anti-patterns; judge a candidate by which anti-pattern it trips

ruledOutDirections.approach: Carrying both sides of a cross-lineage conflict to be safe
ruledOutDirections.reason: a program that both extends the destructive loop AND quarantines it is incoherent; select the survived fact
the governance boundary is blast-radius-human-reviewed, not fix-safety; corpus-wide CI fix is unbounded and unreviewed

ruledOutDirections.approach: Any retrieval promotion path that skips C2
ruledOutDirections.reason: RAIL-2 forecloses it; every retrieval item routes through C2; the assembler bypasses only because it is non-retrieval (post-floor, no re-index)
